description: Detection pack for QuickReport components. QuickReport forms and report bands are report definitions, not ordinary FMX forms, so this pack reports them and avoids unsafe automatic conversion.

rules.manual_review_reason: QuickReport reports need report-engine migration or manual preservation outside normal FMX form conversion.
Report bands belong to report layout and should not be converted as FMX controls.
Subdetail report sections require report-specific migration.
QuickReport labels should remain in report definitions or be migrated by a report-specific workflow.
Data-bound report fields require report-engine migration.
Report expressions require formula and dataset review.
Report memo content belongs to the report definition.
Report images need report-layout and asset review.
Report shapes should be handled by report migration.
QuickReport preview UI requires manual replacement or report-engine support.
